title: Neighborhood Map Walk
description: A young mapmaker studies nearby landmarks on a grown-up walk or from a window, then draws a personal neighborhood map.
learningGoals: Develop spatial thinking around home and nearby streets
Use simple drawings as map symbols
Connect a personal place to a wider neighborhood
interactionModel: tap the large done step after each real-world drawing or spotting mission; timers create roomy observation and mapmaking periods
feedbackModel: warm expedition-leader speech with sparkle, tick, and tada SFX; the child's map is treated as authoritative and has no wrong streets

modes.title: Make Your Map
modes.skill: draw landmarks and routes as a personal map

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
